tasks.name: Add building_blocks_submissions query to dashboard loader
tasks.purpose: Fetch user's presentation outlines from database for display in table

constraints: Query must be added to existing Promise.all for parallel fetching
Select only needed columns: id, title, presentation_type, updated_at
Order by updated_at DESC for most recent first
RLS automatically filters by auth.uid()

tasks.input_state: Dashboard loader exists with other data queries; building_blocks_submissions table exists with RLS policies
tasks.output_state: Dashboard loader returns presentationOutlines array alongside existing data
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Loader function returns presentationOutlines array with id, title, presentation_type, and updated_at fields

tasks.name: Create TanStack Table column definitions for presentations table
tasks.purpose: Define table structure with title, type badge, relative time, and edit action columns

dependencies: Building blocks submission type from database.types.ts
constraints: 4 columns: Title (text), Type (Badge), Last Updated (relative time), Actions (Edit link)
Type column uses Badge with appropriate variant
Last Updated uses relative time formatting (e.g., 'Today', '2 days ago')
Edit action links to /home/ai/blocks/{id}
Use Trans component for i18n keys

tasks.input_state: New file to create; Badge and Button components available; database type for building_blocks_submissions exists
tasks.output_state: Column definitions file exports typed column array for TanStack Table
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exports presentationsColumns array with 4 ColumnDef objects that TypeScript validates
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/presentations-columns.tsx && grep -q 'ColumnDef' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/presentations-columns.tsx && grep -q 'Badge' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/presentations-columns.tsx && grep -c 'header:' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/presentations-columns.tsx | grep -q '^4$'

tasks.name: Create PresentationsTable component with Card wrapper
tasks.purpose: Render full-width table with card styling and New Presentation button

constraints: Client component (use client directive)
Wrap DataTable in Card with CardHeader and CardContent
CardHeader contains title and New Presentation button
New Presentation button links to /home/ai/blocks
Component accepts data prop typed to building_blocks_submissions
Add data-testid='presentations-table' to Card

tasks.input_state: Column definitions exist; DataTable and Card components available; no PresentationsTable component exists
tasks.output_state: PresentationsTable component renders table with card wrapper and action button
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component file exists with 'use client', imports DataTable and columns, and renders Card with table
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/presentations-table.tsx && grep -q '"use client"' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/presentations-table.tsx && grep -q 'DataTable' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/presentations-table.tsx && grep -q 'CardHeader' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/presentations-table.tsx && grep -q '/home/ai/blocks' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/presentations-table.tsx

tasks.name: Wire PresentationsTable to dashboard page
tasks.purpose: Integrate table component into dashboard layout with data from loader

constraints: Import PresentationsTable component
Call dashboard loader to get presentationOutlines data
Pass data to PresentationsTable component
Component should render in full-width grid row (bottom row of 3-3-1 layout)
Maintain existing page structure

tasks.input_state: Dashboard page exists with empty PageBody; PresentationsTable component exists; loader returns presentationOutlines
tasks.output_state: Dashboard page renders PresentationsTable with data from loader in bottom row
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Dashboard page imports and renders PresentationsTable component with presentationOutlines prop
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && grep -q 'PresentationsTable' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && grep -q 'presentationOutlines' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && grep -q 'dashboard-page.loader' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx

tasks.name: Add i18n translation keys for presentations table
tasks.purpose: Provide internationalized text for table headers, button labels, and empty state

dependencies: Trans component usage in table components
constraints: Add keys under 'dashboard' namespace
Keys needed: presentationsTitle, newPresentation, columnTitle, columnType, columnUpdated, columnActions, editOutline, noPresentations
Follow existing naming conventions
Provide clear, concise English strings

tasks.input_state: Translation file exists with other dashboard keys; components use Trans with i18nKey references
tasks.output_state: Translation file contains all required keys for presentations table
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Translation file includes all 8 required keys under dashboard.presentations namespace
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && grep -q '"presentationsTitle"' public/locales/en/common.json && grep -q '"newPresentation"' public/locales/en/common.json && grep -q '"columnTitle"' public/locales/en/common.json && grep -q '"editOutline"' public/locales/en/common.json
